title: City of Boston Apprenticeship Fair
summary: Annual apprenticeship fair for Boston residents seeking opportunities in trades and technical fields.

title: IINE Pre-CNA Program
summary: Pre-Certified Nursing Assistant training program. Starts May 18.
eligibility: High school graduates with interest in healthcare.

title: MGH Behavioral Health Paraprofessional Training
summary: June 2026 cohort training program for behavioral health paraprofessionals.
eligibility: Passion for healthcare and community support.

title: Boston Medical Center Healthcare Internship
summary: 10-week summer internship for students interested in hospital administration and direct patient care support.

title: MassChallenge Tech Summer Program
summary: Summer tech immersion program focused on startups.

title: Boston Foundation First-Gen Scholarship
summary: Financial support for first-generation college students from the Boston area.

title: United Way Community Service Fellowship
summary: Paid summer fellowship working directly with Boston community centers.

title: Google Tech Internship Cohort Fall 2026
summary: Fall software engineering internship based in Cambridge.
eligibility: Current university students majoring in CS or related fields.

title: Success Boston College Support Network
summary: Ongoing mentorship and advising for incoming college freshmen transitioning from BPS.

title: Rhodes Scholarship 2026
summary: Fully-funded postgraduate study at the University of Oxford for exceptional students worldwide.
eligibility: Ages 18-24, completed undergraduate degree by October 2026.

title: Hack the North 2026
summary: Canada's largest hackathon — 36 hours, 1,500+ students, fully-funded travel for international attendees.

title: Boston Bar Foundation Law Fellowship
summary: Paid summer legal fellowship placing first-generation and underrepresented college students in Boston-area law firms and public interest organisations. Includes mentoring and bar-association networking.
eligibility: First-generation or underrepresented college students pursuing law or policy careers. Boston area preferred.

title: ACLU Massachusetts Civil Liberties Internship
summary: Summer internship in civil rights litigation, advocacy, and community outreach. Interns work alongside staff attorneys on active cases and policy campaigns.
eligibility: College juniors and seniors interested in civil liberties, social justice, or law. Stipend available.

title: Dana-Farber Cancer Institute Research Internship
summary: Hands-on summer research internship for undergraduates in biology, biochemistry, or health sciences. Work in a world-class oncology lab alongside faculty researchers.
eligibility: College students majoring in biology, life sciences, or pre-medicine. Boston area.
